mapper.select:
SELECT a.*, CASE WHEN (quest_type = 'ONE' OR quest_type = 'MULTI' OR quest_type = 'DESCRIPTION') AND cnt > 0 THEN ROUND((cnt/( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM CMS_SURVEY_ANSWER_DETAIL b WHERE a.survey_idx = b.survey_idx AND a.quest_idx = b.quest_idx )) * 100,2) WHEN (quest_type = 'ONE' OR quest_type = 'MULTI' OR quest_type = 'DESCRIPTION') AND cnt = 0 THEN 0 WHEN (quest_type = 'MATRIX') AND cnt > 0 THEN ROUND((cnt/( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM CMS_SURVEY_ANSWER_MATRIX b WHERE a.survey_idx = b.survey_idx AND a.quest_idx = b.quest_idx AND a.matrix_idx = b.matrix_idx)) * 100,2) WHEN (quest_type = 'MATRIX') AND cnt = 0 THEN 0
ELSE 0 END ratio FROM ( SELECT a.*, CASE WHEN (quest_type = 'ONE' OR quest_type = 'MULTI') THEN (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM CMS_SURVEY_ANSWER_DETAIL b WHERE a.survey_idx = b.survey_idx AND a.quest_idx = b.quest_idx AND a.quest_detail_order = b.choice_answer ) WHEN (quest_type = 'DESCRIPTION') THEN (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM CMS_SURVEY_ANSWER_DETAIL b WHERE a.survey_idx = b.survey_idx AND a.quest_idx = b.quest_idx) ELSE (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM CMS_SURVEY_ANSWER_MATRIX b WHERE a.survey_idx = b.survey_idx AND a.quest_idx = b.quest_idx AND a.matrix_idx = b.matrix_idx AND a.quest_detail_order = b.matrix_answer) END cnt FROM ( SELECT a.survey_idx, a.quest_idx, a.quest_type, a.quest_content, a.quest_auth, a.quest_detail_free_yn, a.quest_order, a.quest_count, b.quest_detail_idx, b.quest_detail_order, b.quest_detail_title, c.matrix_idx, c.matrix_order, c.matrix_title FROM CMS_SURVEY_QUEST a, CMS_SURVEY_QUEST_DETAIL b, CMS_SURVEY_QUEST_matrix c WHERE a.survey_idx = #{survey_idx} AND a.homepage_id = #{homepage_id} AND a.homepage_id = b.homepage_id(+) AND a.survey_idx = b.survey_idx(+) AND a.quest_idx = b.quest_idx(+) AND a.survey_idx = c.survey_idx(+) AND a.quest_idx = c.quest_idx(+) ORDER BY a.quest_order, b.quest_detail_order, c.matrix_order ) a ) a

SELECT a.*, CASE WHEN cnt > 0 THEN ROUND((cnt/(SELECT COUNT(*) FROM CMS_SURVEY_ANSWER_DETAIL b WHERE a.survey_idx = b.survey_idx AND a.quest_idx = b.quest_idx )) * 100,2) ELSE 0 END ratio, (( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM CMS_SURVEY_ANSWER_DETAIL b WHERE a.survey_idx = b.survey_idx AND a.quest_idx = b.quest_idx )) AS total_cnt FROM ( SELECT a.*, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM CMS_SURVEY_ANSWER_DETAIL b WHERE a.survey_idx = b.survey_idx AND a.quest_idx = b.quest_idx AND a.quest_detail_order = b.choice_answer) AS cnt FROM CMS_SURVEY_QUEST_DETAIL a WHERE survey_idx = #{survey_idx} AND quest_idx = #{quest_idx} AND homepage_id = #{homepage_id} ORDER BY quest_detail_order ) a

SELECT homepage_id, survey_idx, quest_idx, matrix_idx, matrix_order, matrix_title, add_date, add_user_id FROM CMS_SURVEY_QUEST_MATRIX WHERE survey_idx = #{survey_idx} AND quest_idx = #{quest_idx} AND homepage_id = #{homepage_id} ORDER BY matrix_order

SELECT a.*, CASE WHEN cnt > 0 THEN ROUND( (cnt/(SELECT COUNT(*) FROM CMS_SURVEY_ANSWER_MATRIX WHERE survey_idx = #{survey_idx} AND quest_idx = #{quest_idx} AND matrix_idx = #{matrix_idx}) ) * 100,2) ELSE 0 END ratio FROM ( SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM CMS_SURVEY_ANSWER_MATRIX c WHERE b.quest_detail_order = c.matrix_answer AND b.survey_idx = c.survey_idx AND b.quest_idx = c.quest_idx AND a.matrix_idx = c.matrix_idx ) AS cnt FROM CMS_SURVEY_QUEST_DETAIL b, CMS_SURVEY_QUEST_MATRIX a WHERE b.quest_idx = a.quest_idx AND b.homepage_id = a.homepage_id AND b.survey_idx = a.survey_idx AND a.matrix_idx = #{matrix_idx} AND a.survey_idx = #{survey_idx} AND a.quest_idx = #{quest_idx} AND a.homepage_id = #{homepage_id} ORDER BY b.quest_detail_order ) a

SELECT homepage_id, survey_idx, quest_idx, answer_idx, add_user_id, add_date, short_answer FROM CMS_SURVEY_ANSWER_DETAIL WHERE survey_idx = #{survey_idx} AND homepage_id = #{homepage_id} AND quest_idx = #{quest_idx} AND (choice_answer = 99 or choice_answer = 0) AND short_answer IS NOT NULL ORDER BY answer_idx

SELECT quest_idx, LISTAGG(choice_answer, ',') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY answer_idx) AS choice_answer, MIN(short_answer) AS short_answer FROM CMS_SURVEY_ANSWER_DETAIL WHERE survey_idx = #{survey_idx} AND add_user_id = #{add_user_id} GROUP BY quest_idx ORDER BY quest_idx
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM CMS_SURVEY_ANSWER_USER WHERE survey_idx = #{survey_idx} AND homepage_id = #{homepage_id} AND chosen_yn = 'Y'
